# AI-Lab Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-12-31

## Active Technologies
- Bash 4.0+ (standard on Ubuntu 20.04+ WSL distributions) + None (standard Linux utilities: sudo, cat, grep, nslookup) (003-wsl-dns-config)
- Local configuration files (/etc/wsl.conf, /etc/resolv.conf) with backup copies (003-wsl-dns-config)

- Bicep (latest stable version compatible with Azure CLI) + Azure CLI (az deployment), Azure Virtual WAN, Azure VPN Gateway, Azure Key Vault (001-vwan-core)

src/
tests/
